data.name: Henteria Chronicles : The Peacekeepers
data.detailed_description:
Year 853 after the Celestial Beings fell on Henteria.

The island-kingdom of Nos'Ra is, in spite of its small size, one of the most prosperous in all of Henteria. The island is considered by many as a land of opportunities, hopes and dreams, where anyone can get a fresh start in life. That is what Leto and his family were hoping for when they clandestinely boarded a boat headed for Nos'Ra . However, after a tragic and mysterious accident, our young protagonist ends up alone in a foreign country, surrounded by unknown faces.

The game follows Leto as he grows up in an entirely new environment and meets new people, such as the kind-hearted Haylen, his adoptive mother, his new sister, the reserved Cyanna, Lily, with a temper as fiery as her hair, and Rose, the princess of the kingdom. Still, none of them are aware of the dark fog that is slowly enveloping the capital city of Luminia, and the plot that will target the women around Leto and throw his life in disarray.

  • Several hours of gameplay

  • 100+ spicy scenes with several minutes of professionally voiced sexy sounds (moans, panting, etc...)

  • Hundreds of entirely original pixel art character sprites, assets, and animations

  • Minutiously crafted maps with tons of hidden events and mini-stories

  • Two different PoVs: partial PoV, and omniscient PoV

  • An optional card game with its own small storyline

  • Characters' portraits and characters' full body art which gets lewder as the story progresses

  • A coherent quest system to easily identify what your next objective is without ever getting lost

  • A reminiscence room to watch and rewatch all your favourite sex scenes

  • No combat or filler/fetch quests, with a gameplay more akin to a visual novel






  • The game revolves around unavoidable Netorare, which means the girls being corrupted behind the back and ultimately stolen away from the protagonist. However, a revenge ending and a happy ending are planned upon release besides the netorare ending for those who wish to see our protagonist either live happily ever after or take revenge on those who wronged him.

  • All the in-game scenes are shown only in pixel art, with no accompanying CG besides the character's portraits.

  • Due to engine limitations and the sheer size of the game, it will have to be split into two different parts to complete development.

data.short_description: Help Leto navigate through the turmoils of his life in the city of Luminia and interact with the women close to him. Slow burn pixel art NTR eroge with an engaging storyline, plenty of spicy content, tons of custom sprites and animations, hidden events, sexy ambiance sounds, and much more!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

Minimum:

  • Processor: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
